title: Nicknames: one-time settable via /iam in chat
description: Users can set a display nickname with /iam <name> in the chat room. The relay stores it permanently and broadcasts it. Nicknames cannot be changed once set. Collisions are allowed — real identity is always the pub_id hash.
close_reason: Nicknames implemented: /iam <name> in chat, relay stores immutably, broadcasts UserNickname, included in DirectoryList and UserJoined
